channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: India bids to attract over $200B in AI infrastructure investment by 2028
item.description: India is ramping up shared AI compute, adding 20,000 GPUs as part of a broader push to attract global AI investment.

item.title: A High-Protein Stuffed Sweet Potato That’s Seriously Satisfying
item.description: Serve it with this zesty slaw.

item.title: Hegseth considering severe penalty on Anthropic as negotiations stall
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reportedly is close to putting Claude maker Anthropic on a “supply chain risk” list that would be a devastating blow to...

item.title: IHG's new flash sale can save you 25% on stays around the world
item.description: IHG's current flash sale offers 25% off to IHG One Rewards members.

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “My will states that my daughter will receive a fairly large portion of my estate.”

item.title: Donald Trump Trash-Talks Barack Obama in Tribute to Jesse Jackson
item.description: Hours after Reverend Jesse Jackson's death, President Donald Trump memorialized the civil rights pioneer in a way only Trump could ... by making it al...

item.title: ‘It’s a life-changing sum’: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance to support political causes I vehemently oppose?
item.description: ”I would hate for our money to end up in the hands of organizations that oppose everything we have supported throughout our lives.”

item.title: Pedro Pascal & Rafael Olarra Watch 'Wuthering Heights' Together in Theater
item.description: Pedro Pascal and Rafael Olarra have been getting close lately ... after being snapped sightseeing in NYC over the Valentine's Day weekend, we now have...

item.title: Points and miles aren’t just for the good times. They can be a godsend in an emergency, too
item.description: When a family emergency struck thousands of miles from home, points and miles saved me and my husband.

item.title: Olympic Sprinter Fred Kerley's Battery Charge Dropped
item.description: The battery charge against two-time Olympic medalist Fred Kerley was dropped on Tuesday, according to his lawyer, who tells TMZ Sports that prosecutor...

item.title: Amazon Fire TV’s new interface is now rolling out in the U.S.
item.description: Fire TV's new interface simplifies its layout and navigation and adds Alexa+.

item.title: Lindsey Vonn Returns Home After Olympic Nightmare, Still Can’t Stand
item.description: Lindsey Vonn is back stateside -- even if she still can’t get back on her feet. The Olympic ski legend revealed Monday night on X she’s back on “home ...

item.title: Apple Podcasts is getting an enhanced video experience this spring
item.description: By bringing an enhanced video podcasts viewing experience to its app, Apple is aiming to keep users from turning to rival platforms to watch their fav...

item.title: ‘Am I crazy?’ My boyfriend’s parents say he shouldn’t marry me until he earns $50K a year. Who is to blame here?
item.description: “Am I crazy, or are these ‘real’ concerns from his parents?”

item.title: The smart way to use AI to do your taxes
item.description: Plus: the truth behind how the ‘G-Wagon write off’ really works

item.title: Here are the 17 US-based AI companies that have raised $100m or more in 2026
item.description: Three U.S.-based AI companies raised rounds larger than $1 billion so far in 2026 with 14 others raising rounds of $100 million or more.

item.title: 'Chicago Fire' Star Brittany Curran Arrested, Booked on Drunk in Public Charge
item.description: "Chicago Fire" star Brittany Curran has been arrested, TMZ has learned. According to the Burbank Police Department, the 35-year-old actress showed up ...

item.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
item.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, inclu...

item.title: Should You Take Methylated B Vitamins? Here’s What You Need To Know
item.description: You don't want to miss out on these brain benefits.

item.title: The Science-Backed Morning Habit You're Missing — It Takes Only 5 Minutes
item.description: Plus, it's quick, free, and incredibly effective.

item.title: 11 ways your trip could be ruined if you make these mistakes
item.description: Lost luggage and missed flights are inconveniences, but then there are the travel mistakes that can ruin an entire vacation. Here's how to avoid them.

item.title: 7 Science-Backed Ways to Lower Your Blood Pressure Naturally
item.description: No 2. on the list is crucial.

item.title: How to Support Your Heart Health With 2 Simple Nightly Steps
item.description: According to a new study, it's not what you eat but when.

item.title: Princess Cruises’ Captain’s Circle loyalty program: Everything you need to know
item.description: Princess offers a four-tier cruise loyalty program with a variety of perks. Here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Bilt Rewards program: Earn points on housing, card benefits and more
item.description: How does Bilt Rewards work? Learn how to earn points on rent or mortgage payments, redeem for travel and fitness classes, earn elite status, and more.
